particulars.description: The company with full title guarantee hereby charges the property to bibby by way of legal mortgage with payment to bibby of the debtor’s obligations and all other money hereby covenanted to be paid or otherwise payable hereunder. “The property” means all that freehold land lying to the west of bankwood lane, new rossington, doncaster as the same is contained in title number SYK325421 and registered at hm land registry.. Notification of addition to or amendment of charge.
Land lying to the west of bankwood lane rossington doncaster south yorkshire t/no SYK325421.

Land and buildings off bankwood lane rossington doncaster t/n SYK301775 SYK302923 SYK73483 and SYK73484.
